transcript.text:
-Amazing -You are special
How can you digest all of that?
You're not playing games You're here to EAT
[What exactly happened here?]
[Tzuyang is here!]
[Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)]
[With other sides]
[Eat & eat] [And keep eating]
[Let's get to it!]
[A famous restaurant here in Gangnam]
[A small restaurant located between these buildings]
Hello everyone
I'm at Jamwon-dong today
There's a tteokboki place here that I've been wanting to try
It's known to be visited frequently by the celebrities
Also known as actor Ha Jung Woo tteokboki

I've been curious to find out how it tastes like
[Jamwon Tteokboki] [Seoul, Seocho-gu]
And it's been here for 40 years
[With the same nostalgic interior]
Hello
I couldn't recognize you with the face mask
I can tell from your laugh though
-Do you know me? -Yes
-Tzuyang, right? -That's right
We can tell just from your voice
How many years has it been?
-40 years -40 years? That's a very long time
[Autographs from the celebrities]
This place is in Gangnam
But it feels like an old place
Very cool

The menu I want to try everything
What's fried ham?
[Reading the menu]
They said a lot of students start coming at 4pm So I'll hurry and leave before then
I will to-go if I have to
Excuse me
3 orders of tteokboki,
And 1 of everything, please
Everything...?
Yes, 1 order of everything
[Jamwon tteokboki] (spicy rice cake)
[Crispy tempura]
[Chewy Soondae] (pork blood sausage)
[Warm fishcake soup]
[And kimbap]
[All ready to go]

Bon appetit
I really love these plates
Dried filefish as an appetizer
This is a chip
The crunchy ones
What do you call it again? Kui kui?
That's good
Do I eat it like this?
This would be good as a topping here
Let's keep it here
Let's try the tteokboki now
Looks like flour rice cake
With soup
Get it all together
I love this
Something everyone has had before

It's really good
A little sweet & spicy
Not bitter at all
Very flavorful
The rice cake is really chewy
It's thick too
It's not an old-style or new-style tteokboki Somewhere in the middle
Let's try the tempura too
This is really unique
It's like a really soft bread
The outside layer is a little crispy
But the inside is cushiony
This is kimbap
Fried kimbap
We used to have this on our menu too But not anymore
It's tasty

Sweet potato
Cheese sticks need to be eaten when they are fresh But too late
The dumpling is completely filled
Coke, please
This is on the sweeter side
But it's as flavorful So it's good
Soondae Look how soft it looks
Dip it
They only have the soondae and the liver
The liver tastes great
It goes really well with salt
More than the tteokboki sauce
That hotdog-like thing was fried ham?
It really does taste like a hot dog
Let's break the egg
This is something kids would like

Looks good
This is the real deal So savory
I haven't had the fishcake yet
Can't forget about the fishcake
The prices are so cheap considering that it's located in Gangnam
This is really cost-efficient
Tteokboki is 4,000 Won, and they give you a lot (~$2.80 USD)
This must be the fried ham It tastes like a hot dog
Delicious
This is just what I like
1,200 Won for the small kimbap (~$0.84 USD
1 roll is this long
Come here
Rice cake kimbap
Should I break this up?
Do people eat it like this?

Flakes
I'll give it a try
Not bad
It's just crispy at first
But the flavors kick it after
It should be great with alcohol
Hello
-Are you enjoying the food? -Yes I am
You're not playing games You're here to EAT
Eat a lot
She is the 1st generation of this restaurant She is 84 years old
She looks very healthy
Another coke, please
The portions are big
It's hard to find tteokboki for 4,000 Won
Because of inflation

I'm getting sad Rice cake costs a lot now
You eat well
[2nd generation owner]
[A video that he really loved?]
Yellowtail mukbang
[10kg of Yellowtail] [2022.01.27]
She eats so well too
Fishcake and soy sauce
[Photo time before he leaves]
-Thank you -Thank you
I will be back again
Thank you
How does it taste?
It's delicious I love tteokboki like this
We make everything here
With red pepper powder

So we make the paste
Isn't it hard to keep the same flavor?
We had this same recipe for 40 years
The same flavors?
You are very good at eating
Thank you
[A fan meet & greet]
[Memories for the students]
Thank you
-You're pretty -Oh no
There's a school nearby so a lot of students come here
It's an honor And it was very unexpected
You are so pretty
Way prettier in person
You are gorgeous as well
[Thank you]

These places are perfect for to-go orders on your way home
It's not as common anymore though
There used to be a lot
Fresh liver is the best
I love drinking the fishcake soup after a bite of rice cake
It warms me up
Fishcake
This place is also known as actor Ha Jung Woo tteokboki as I mentioned earlier
His autograph is here Very cool
Their names are all written here
I like intestines more than soondae
I always ask for less soondae and more intestines
Especially lungs and heart
I'm not sure about the other parts
Definitely the lungs
Last fishcake Dipped in soy sauce

In 1 bite?
It's 4 now so I can hear the students outside
I better go now
I'm finished
Thanks everyone~
How precious
How did you find someone like her?
[Thank you for the meal] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
